info.english_meaning: to boast to be egoistic to cheat to tear off to powder to speak to talk

info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' kalkane muYcate muYceH mokze muYcati muYcate ' (Slo.47) iti devaH  ' muca ' iti candrasammataH pAWaH  ' kalkanam = damBaH kaTanaM ca ' iti kzIrataraNgiRI  ' SAWyam ' iti mEtreyaH  ' katTanaM ceti svAmI ' iti mA.DA.vfttiH  ' kaTanam ityanye ' iti sidDAntakOmudI  evaYca bahvarTakatvaM kalkanaSabdasyeti jYeyam
